items.phrase: If I study hard, I'll pass
items.translation: Если я буду усердно заниматься, я сдам
items.example: If I study hard, I'll pass the exam with good marks.

items.phrase: I'll call you when I arrive
items.example: I'll call you when I arrive at the airport.

items.phrase: If it rains, I'll stay at home
items.translation: Если пойдёт дождь, я останусь дома
items.example: If it rains, I'll stay at home and watch a film.

items.phrase: I won't go until I finish this
items.translation: Я не уйду, пока не закончу это
items.example: I won't go until I finish this report.

items.phrase: I'll text you as soon as I hear anything
items.translation: Я напишу тебе, как только что-то узнаю
items.example: I'll text you as soon as I hear anything about the job.
What will you do if you don't get the job?
